name: Aden Ramirez
title: CS @ UTEP building backend, systems, and AI projects.
subtitle: Open to software engineering internships.
semester_focus: This semester I'm focused on advanced Java work, systems thinking, and building fuller end-to-end product projects.

education.school: The University of Texas at El Paso

about: I'm a computer science student at UTEP working at the intersection of backend systems, product engineering, and practical AI tools.
I like projects with real constraints: performance tradeoffs, cleanup work, test coverage, rollout safety, and interfaces people actually use.

Lately that has meant production infrastructure work at Google, customer-facing troubleshooting at Intuit, and a steady stream of side projects that sharpen both engineering depth and product judgment.
I'm looking for internships where I can contribute quickly, write careful code, and keep leveling up around strong engineers.

experience.title: STEP Intern, Software Engineering
bullets: Redesigned the D4 compilation pipeline around per-entity parallelism, improving p50 latency by 30% and raising QA throughput by 15%.
Migrated 6 core modules to PromiseGraph, lifting test coverage from 60% to 95% and shortening review cycles by 20%.
Ran a zero-incident Dev, QA, and Prod rollout through a 10-step gated launch plan for a critical production update.
Built 50+ unit and integration tests plus 7 Streamz dashboards so the team could track latency, error rates, and system health live.

experience.title: Product Expert, TurboTax
experience.context: Outbound phone transfer agent supporting TurboTax customers.
bullets: Resolved 40+ tax-related customer issues per shift, maintaining a 94% first-call resolution rate and cutting callback volume by 18%.
Explained complex product and tax flows across 600+ interactions, holding a 4.7/5.0 customer satisfaction average.

additional_experience.title: Part-time Employee
additional_experience.context: Worked across cashier, food prep, customer service, and closing duties in a high-volume environment.
